titleStmt.title: SII 24.309: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 309. (A.R. No. 119 of 1937-38.) NĀṈMUGAṈ-GŌPURA, INNER WALL, RIGHT OF ENTRANCE

p.hi: No date

summary.p: The inscription is in Kannaḍa engraved in Grantha characters. Registers a royal order (nirupa) to Chauḍappa, the executive officer of Tiruchirāppaḷḷi, to restore to Uttama-Nambi, the Sthānika of Śrīraṅgam, on a representation made by the latter, certain concessions granted to the Sthānikas of the place during the time of Hiriya-Śiruparasa, and in addition, to grant him the village of Nochchagarichi (Nochchikuṟichchi) along with some additional lands in another village as Sarvamānya to be enjoyed by him in the same manner as it was being enjoyed in the days of Hiriya-Dēvarāya Mahārāya and Vijayarāya-Mahārāya. The order further enjoins the pārupatya to execute all the directions pertaining to the temple made by Uttama-Nambi. The present gift of lands were to be added on to an earlier royal gift of villages yielding 300 honnu made on the occasion of presenting (to the god) golden horses and chariot. In recognition of his long service, Uttama-Nambi is said to have been honoured (by the king) with bracelet, gold and necklace and golden pinnacles (kalaśa) to his house.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

p.hi: śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa dēvarāyamahārāyaruti rucirāpaṅḷiya cauḍappagē nirūpa . śrīraṅganātha
dēvarasthānika Uttamanambi namma pāddabandiyalli Aphāradinatōḍaga sēvēya māḍhikōṇḍu yiddhā 3 nāū Ātananu pāliśikaḍaga vōṅ
galu kaṇṭhamālēyanu citaiyśi Ātanamanēgē cinnyadakaḷasavanu cittayi śi śrīraṅganāthadēvara pūjēyanu cēnnāgi māḍuvahāgē Ātagē
nirupava kōṭṭu kaḷahidēvāgi śrīraṅganāthadēvarasthānaū sarvamānyavāda kāraṇa Ādēvara tiruvaḍayāṭṭa vaṭṭinahaṅḷigaḷigē nāḍugāṇikē
ka
ḍa bēgāra Uluḍhē muntādau kēraḷa ḷalāga kēka dēvarapātra bhōgadavaranu
dēvara vē māḍuvahāgē kaṭṭaḷēyamāḍhi cittaiyisi dēvara Avaranu karaśikōḷalāgi śrīraṅgadasthānikarigē hiriyaśiruvara(sa)
sana kāladalu ḍi jivitavilladēyiga vērgagaḷau kōḷḷa kōḍarē ḷu namagē Uttamanambi binnaham māḍidarāgi Āśiruvarasa
na kāladalu ha maryyādēkalla vērgagaḷava kōṅḷadahāgē ka ḷēya māḍūdu Uttamanambigē sarvamānyavāgi pālisi nōccagu
ciyēmba grāmadallu jīvitagā
rigē da
nada Āūri gē
nāgi Ā
gē mattōṅa Ūra nalu nēlanasēriśi kōṭṭuyitagē Adanu naḍaśi bahudu prāku hiriya dēvarāya mahārāyarū vijēya
rāyamahārāyara kāla mōdalāgi yiṅuparyyantara Āsthānahēṅgē mānnyavāgi naḍa dubanttu Āmaryyādayalēkhya Uttamanambi
jamānyadalū naḍaśikōṇḍu bahudu . Ātanu dēvasthānaviṣaya vāgi Ēnōndu kēlasakāryyavabandu hēḷidarēvū pārupatya ḍā
vuduhindē nāvū cittaiyista hēmāśvarathadānapuṇyakāladalū Uttamanambi gē varāha munnū
hōmnninagrāmagaḷanu sarvamānyavāgi dhārēya
śāsanavanu cittaiyaśi yigrāmagaḷanu sēriśi kōḍuvahāgē ninagē rāyasavanu citaisidakkē grāmagaḷanu śēriśi kōṭṭē
nimagē nirupa ham māḍikaḷihidē Āmunnū
hō
gutta gēgē Utta
śi cittayisidēvāgi Āgrāmagaḷanu naḍava bahudu .

div.p: Digital edition of SII 24.309 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
